# Stonk Trader Shell

Local permissionless StonkBroker TBA agent on Robinhood Chain.

## Run

```
npm install && npm run web:install
cp .env.example .env
npm run shell
```

Dashboard http://localhost:3000 · API http://127.0.0.1:8788

## Secrets (.env only)

PRIVATE_KEY, STONK_TOKEN_ID, LLM_API_KEY, X_API_*, DRY_RUN

## Settings (data/settings.json)

policy=core, reserveWethPct=30, deployPct=15, allowlist (candidates), minNotionalUsd=3, minEdgeBps=10, thesis notes

Broadcast when Dry run is OFF (dashboard toggle).

## Decision doctrine

See docs/TRADING.md — allowlist is candidates; buys need preferBuys from LLM/thesis; TP/SL exits; fee gate.

AGENTS.md for loop + rails (LLM, X MCP, RH research MCP).

## Engines

Uniswap v4 UniversalRouter preferred; V3 fallback. Universe: data/assets.json.

## MCP

npm run mcp — prepare_broker_trade, analyze_broker_portfolio, prepare_portfolio_rebalance, post_trade_to_x

Never use Robinhood place_* for TBA execution.
